name: Chocolate Macaroons
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Microwave chocolate in a large microwavable bowl on HIGH (100% power) for 1 to 2 minutes, stirring after each minute until almost melted. Stir until the chocolate is completely melted and smooth.
3. Stir in coconut, condensed milk, and vanilla extract.
4. Drop by teaspoonfuls about 1 inch apart onto well-greased cookie sheets.
5. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes or until set. Immediately remove from cookie sheets to cool on wire racks.
Preparation Time: 10 minutes
Baking Time: 10 to 12 minutes
